name: Festive Cheese Tarts
recipeIngredient: Red and green maraschino cherries; cut up
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: CHRISTMAS COOKBOOK
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Place 12 miniature foil baking cups, each measuring 2x1 inch, on a cookie sheet.
3. Place one vanilla wafer in each cup.
4. Beat cream cheese, sugar, egg, milk, and vanilla together on low speed for 30 seconds.
5. Continue beating on medium speed until the mixture is smooth, about 1 minute.
6. Spoon 2 tablespoons of the mixture into each cup.
7. Bake for 13-15 minutes or until set.
8. Allow to cool.
9. Garnish each tart with cherry pieces.
10. Store in refrigerator.
